rulings.Case Title: HERNAN CARLO MACDULA ET AL VS. SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANT SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for violation of CC 2923.7. Plaintiff failed to allege any facts and failed to provide any facts that could be alleged in opposition to support any violation of this code section. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Allegations are sufficient to support claims for violation of CC 2923.6, negligence and UCL. P alleged a change in financial circumstances and any argument regarding the sufficiency of the appeal, which is a alleged to have been submitted, is a question of fact for a jury to determine. As previously stated, the Court will follow Alvarez on the issue of duty. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SUTRO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC. VS. ANGUS GAVIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT ANGUS GAVIN, JOHN GAVIN MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is DENIED. Defendants had actual notice of this action for possession and rent/holdover damages (Complaint, paragraph 19) via their counsel at least as of March 15, 2021 (3 months after default was entered) but failed to address the action for rent/holdover damages in any way until November 9, 2021. No explanation for this neglect provided by the defendants. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL V. CHOPKO ET AL VS. VASILKI SERVETA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2021 line 6. DEFENDANT VASILIKI SERVETA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly allege whether Plaintiff is asserting a cause of action under CCP 1161a, CCP 1160(a)(1) or CCP 1160(a)(2) or a combination of these distinct causes of action. If Plaintiff is asserting more than one causes of action under these statutes Plaintiff shall clearly label such causes of action and assert facts in support of each element of the causes of action alleged. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Service of the 5 day notice is properly stated. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.
